items.headline: Police ask for help finding missing East Moline juvenile
items.summary: Police are asking for help locating a missing juvenile. According to a Facebook post by the East Moline Police Department, Neveah Lindsey was last seen at appro…

items.headline: QCT From the Stacks: Pulitzer Prize-winning author earns Bettendorf library's July fiction selection
items.summary: Looking for your next summer read? Bettendorf Public Library recommends a novel by Pulitzer Prize-winning author Andrew Sean Greer as its July fiction pick.

items.headline: Owner of Rock Island nursing home indicted in national health-care fraud investigation
items.summary: The primary owner of St. Anthony's Nursing and Rehabilitation Center, 767 30th St., Rock Island faces charges of health-care fraud, according to the U. S. Attor…

items.headline: East Moline man makes plea deal in Scott County human trafficking case
items.summary: He pleaded guilty to third-degree kidnapping and third-degree sexual abuse, with a sentencing scheduled for Oct. 15.

items.headline: 'You are destroying my life.' Muscatine property owners want block reopened
items.summary: Property and business owners in Muscatine operating in buildings that were shut down because of safety concerns want the city to let them re-open. The Muscatine…

items.headline: Sweet Delite partners with United Way summer event
items.summary: Sweet Delite will host a United Way summer event July 15 from 11 a.m. to 2 p.m. at the Annex lot, donating 18 percent of all sales to support United Way.

items.headline: Bettendorf man faces charges after new park vandalized by fire, graffiti: Court records
items.summary: A 20-year-old Bettendorf man is scheduled to appear in Scott County Court after a new Bettendorf park was damaged, according to Scott County Court arrest affida…

items.headline: Pebble Creek Golf Club & Ike's Restaurant to hold ribbon cutting
items.summary: Golf Club and restaurant celebrates renovations with complimentary cocktails and appetizers that is open the public, followed by live music.
